name: wiiyoukindly-experimental
description: Personal marketplace for tools built inside the wiiyoukindly/experimental workspace. Hosts project-evaluator (AI-native project idea ranker) and plugin-router (smart per-session plugin profile manager).

plugins.name: project-evaluator
plugins.description: AI-native project idea evaluator. Ranks project ideas against a 12-factor weighted framework (Demand Evidence, Build Effort, Technical Fit, Distribution Clarity, Asset Leverage, Time-to-First-Revenue, TAM, Competition Density, Moat, Pricing Power, Differentiator, Operational Burden) under 4 ranking modes (Balanced, Cashflow, Learning, Moat). Uses your existing Claude Code session — no separate API key required for Pro/Max/Team subscribers.

plugins.name: plugin-router
plugins.description: Smart plugin profile router for Claude Code. Enable only the plugins you need per session via named profiles — cuts 30-50k of startup context tokens when you have many plugins installed. Provides /router status|list|analyze|switch|pending|save|core|learn subcommands.
